title: Drug and health product side effects, recalls and complaints - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug and health product side effects, recalls and complaints
Information on submitting a drug and health product complaint, searching the side effect database and viewing recalls and safety alerts. Also report a side effect.

## Services and information

### Report a health product side effect
Know how to report negative reactions to health products, including prescription and non-prescription medications, biologics, natural health products and radiopharmaceuticals.

### View health product recalls and safety alerts
Access a list of alerts and recalls for drug and health products.

### Report a veterinary drug side effect
Understand when and how to report negative reactions to a veterinary drug.

### Search a health product side effect
Use the Canada Vigilance Adverse Reaction Online Database to find side effects to health products.

### Drug and health product complaint process
Find out how to report a complaint about a drug or health product and how complaints are handled.
